summary: Onboarding tour patched to name the daily commands (/phantom, /learn-from-session, /skills) explicitly and to lay the operational bases the tour was previously evoking without naming them. Milestone 5 names /learn-from-session as the compound mechanism. Milestone 6 names /phantom alongside /skills as cockpit + capabilities catalog. Milestone 7 (post-snapshot synthesis) introduces the correction pattern, /phantom {brand} as the visualization tool, and the 'à valider' status that the operator will see across the system. Milestone 8 close gains a Pipeline DTC archetype (snapshot → mine-voc → produce-paid-angles → produce-copy-brief) for paid manager / agency profiles. Replay mode close ends with a one-line reminder of the daily commands.
